Who we are

We deliver world-class human capital and IT services.

ConglomerateIT is a global IT services and consulting company built on Creative, Growth, Innovation, and Technology. We help enterprises transform faster, operate smarter, and stay secure in a digital-first world.

Explore what we do Contact us

Our philosophy

Purpose-driven transformation, delivered with discipline.

Mission

Accelerate progress

At ConglomerateIT, we accelerate progress by innovating boldly, empowering women, transforming healthcare, and creating real-world impact.

Vision

Lead industry transformation

Our vision is to lead industry transformation through innovation, excellence, and equality while empowering businesses, uplifting communities, and improving lives.

C

Creative

Fresh thinking for complex business and technology problems.

G

Growth

Delivery models and teams designed to scale with clients.

I

Innovation

Emerging technology applied to real operational outcomes.

T

Technology

Modern engineering, platforms, infrastructure, and talent.

Core values

The foundation of innovation and excellence.

TimeMachine

Achieving groundbreaking results faster than industry standards and accelerating progress in a fraction of the time others consider possible.

Strategic Thinking

Well-crafted strategies that help clients navigate complexity and drive long-term growth.

Process Excellence

Efficient and effective processes that drive success, foster innovation, and improve delivery consistency.

Quality

The highest standards of quality in every project, ensuring excellence, security, and client satisfaction.

Our journey

From staffing roots to a diversified technology conglomerate.

The legacy page tells a year-by-year story from 2014 through 2024. The same milestones are preserved here in a cleaner, scannable timeline.

2014

Manifestation & Expanding Horizons

Staffing roots built around turning vision into reality and helping organizations build futures through talent.

2015

Going Global

Global expansion began as a strategic move toward long-term success, innovation, and market resilience.

2016

Service Expansion

Services broadened to meet evolving customer needs and increase value across business functions.

2017

QA & Infrastructure Technology Vertical

A dedicated QA and infrastructure vertical strengthened the foundation for digital excellence and reliability.

2018

BI Technology Vertical

Business Intelligence capabilities launched to empower data-driven decisions and actionable insights.

2019

Development, Data & Digital Transformation

Development and data verticals expanded into end-to-end digital transformation services.

2020

Healthcare Staffing Vertical

Specialized healthcare staffing launched to support dynamic healthcare needs with precision, care, and compliance.

2021

Retail Sector Focus

Retail technology focus helped businesses create personalized experiences, streamline operations, and drive innovation.

2022

Infrastructure Services

Infrastructure services expanded with secure, scalable, future-ready data center capabilities.

2023

Conglomerate With 6 Verticals

The business vision matured into a diversified conglomerate structure empowering businesses across industries.

2024

Back Operations Expansion

Back operations expanded to strengthen corporate structure, improve efficiency, and support scalable execution.

Culture

We do not just build tech. We build trust, collaboration, and shared momentum.

ConglomerateIT is powered by technologists, thinkers, and doers across the US, UK, India, and Canada.

Innovation is in our DNA

CGIT teams solve real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and fresh ideas.

Collaboration across borders

Teams in the US, UK, India, and Canada work across time zones while respecting diversity and every voice.

Clients first, always

Every solution starts with client success, security, scalability, and measurable business outcomes.

Growth that never stops

The culture emphasizes learning, ownership, initiative, and professional growth.

The future

The future of technology is fast, fearless, and outcome-led.

CGIT is building toward global expansion, GenAI, blockchain, smart automation, client-first delivery, and centers of excellence.

Global expansion

Launching hubs in Europe and Southeast Asia to deliver closer, smarter client support worldwide.

Next-gen technology

Driving innovation with GenAI, blockchain, and smart automation to keep clients future-proof.

Client-first delivery

Outcome-based models focused on innovation, trust, and measurable business transformation.

Centers of excellence

Cloud, observability, and process automation centers of excellence reshaping IT delivery.

Work with ConglomerateIT to modernize technology, strengthen global delivery, hire specialized talent, and create measurable digital transformation.
